title: andrographis macrobotrys var. ceylanica
intro: Andrographis macrobotrys var. ceylanica, also known as Sri Lankan Andrographis, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Andrographis macrobotrys var. ceylanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, this plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its extracts are used to create various herbal preparations, including capsules and teas.
